title: 10 Tank-Top Outfits That Are Effortlessly Easy for Summer
summary: We’re mapping out 10 tank-top outfits you can wear on repeat this summer, no matter where the day takes you. Re-create your favorite look now.

fullArticle:
Is there a piece that works harder in a summer wardrobe than the white tank top? Whether your go-to is a ribbed high neck, a pointelle cami with thin spaghetti straps, or a fitted V (or maybe even a combination of all three), this humble basic works overtime when it’s too hot to think about more than one layer.

So what looks best with a tank top? Well, the answer is really anything, but a skirt is often a great place to start—just take pointers from Gigi Hadid, who styled hers during an off-duty moment in Paris with black Mary Jane flats and a print lace-trimmed slip. Otherwise, any bottom is fair game; the white tank top is a true closet chameleon, pairing well with everything from capris to denim Bermuda shorts and balloon pants. The 10 looks below prove the point.
